text.fullText: As an asset based single truck operation, there’s a litany of other owner operators as myself all with the same outcry. There are multiple social media characters who created new brokerages teaching other would be brokers how to make 80,000 a month by simple tricks to rip off truck drivers including double brokering. These new double brokers are fishing for unwitting drivers to haul their freight after masquerading as a different carrier on the load boards. The real driver takes the load to the wrong destination, freight gets stolen & the real driver goes to collect & the fake broker is long gone. The carrier who never knew the bad broker used his details to book the load gets put out of business for stealing freight. It’s widespread. WhatsApp & telegram help facilitate these dirty tricks to get unjust enrichment, free freight to resell & I don’t think any broker should be allowed to book from outside the United States. I think brokers should have more regulations and financial audits for fair trade. USA brokers are being harmed by the practices as well. As far as transparency I think that the carriers should be included at the table when negotiating with the shippers. Everyday it’s a slight of hand by brokers & truckers have to be polite when booking and we know we’re getting ripped off. It’s a race to the bottom for every load & if you demand more money they just hang up so I guess transparency is not the answer but creating a system with technology that cancels all brokers would be the fair solution. Brokers are not asset based so I’m sure they can go to McDonald’s & make the same thing that they think we are worth. If you’re listening to truck drivers we are all saying the same thing. Cancel the brokers.
